description: Create a Time-to-Contact (TTC) experiment in PsychoPy Builder simulating a vehicle moving behind a bridge where participants estimate when the vehicle reaches a target line. Download the background image from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/18/P1010368.JPG/1280px-P1010368.JPG and save it to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ttc_task/road_bg.jpg. Create a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ttc_task/conditions.csv with columns 'speed', 'start_pos', and 'direction' containing at least three rows of data. The experiment, saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ttc_task/ttc_task.psyexp, must feature a trial where a circular vehicle moves across the background using the 'speed' and 'start_pos' variables in a time-based position formula, disappears behind a rectangular occluder (positioned at x=0.3, width=0.4), and records a spacebar response. Compile the experiment to generate the Python script.
